name: expo-easy-passkey-repo
description: Open-source Expo module for adding passkey support to Expo projects.

scripts.test:rust-artifacts: bash scripts/record-rust-artifact-metadata.test.sh && bash scripts/build-rust-artifacts.test.sh && bash scripts/smoke-test-packaged-native-artifacts.test.sh && bash scripts/prepare-trusted-native-artifacts.test.sh && bash scripts/check-native-artifact-drift.test.sh
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.pack:check: pnpm --filter expo-easy-passkey build && pnpm --filter expo-easy-passkey prepublishOnly && cd packages/module && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.test: pnpm test:js && pnpm test:rust && pnpm test:rust-artifacts
scripts.verify: pnpm rust:fmt && pnpm rust:clippy && pnpm bindgen:check && pnpm check && pnpm build
